title: 2021 Tokyo stabbings
summary:
2021 Tokyo stabbings can refer to:

August 2021 Tokyo stabbings, a mass stabbing attack on 6 August 2021
October 2021 Tokyo attack, a knife and arson attack on 31 October 2021
